candidate_rule_if_supported: Soften ACTIVE_BURST Gate 6 extension/streak hard reject into a demotion or raise family-specific extension threshold.
current_test: ACTIVE_BURST D/REJECT minus ACTIVE_BURST C/WATCH avg T+5
validation_gate: OOS n_C>=30 and n_D>=30; D/REJECT - C/WATCH >= +1.5 pct points; no deterioration at T+10/T+20 or realized-R.
falsifier: OOS spread compresses below +1.5 pct points, reverses, or realized-R/tradeability test shows Gate6 rejects were not executable.
method_note: Compare ACTIVE_BURST D/REJECT vs ACTIVE_BURST C/WATCH on mature T+5; verdict uses strict OOS rows only.
oos_semantics: current_n_* is cumulative mature evidence; oos_n_* is strict signal_date >= oos_start_date with mature outcome.

candidate_rule_if_supported: Tighten EP_ACTIVE council conversion/rejection rules or require higher downside-risk burden for EP_ACTIVE council rows.
validation_gate: OOS EP_ACTIVE→COUNCIL n>=30; avg T+5 <= -3.0 pct or realized-R negative after stop/tradeability adjustment.
falsifier: OOS EP_ACTIVE council cohort mean-reverts toward neutral/positive or weakness clusters in a different catalyst/sector gate.
method_note: Measure EP_ACTIVE rows routed to COUNCIL on mature T+5; verdict uses strict OOS rows only.
oos_semantics: current_n_* is cumulative mature evidence; oos_n_* is strict signal_date >= oos_start_date with mature outcome.

candidate_rule_if_supported: Re-examine PAUSE-specific B/C gate weighting; potential contraction-quality or visibility-momentum reweight.
current_test: PAUSE C/WATCH minus PAUSE B/WATCH avg T+5
validation_gate: OOS n_B>=50 and n_C>=50; C/WATCH - B/WATCH >= +3.0 pct points; confirm not a 5-day window artifact.
falsifier: OOS B/C spread narrows below +3 pct points, reverses, or PAUSE role proves context-only with no realized-R value.
method_note: Compare PAUSE C/WATCH vs PAUSE B/WATCH on mature T+5; verdict uses strict OOS rows only.
oos_semantics: current_n_* is cumulative mature evidence; oos_n_* is strict signal_date >= oos_start_date with mature outcome.

candidate_rule_if_supported: Use KK confirmation as a Layer 5 priority/confidence signal for Bonde anticipation rows; never as a hard rejection gate without a separate hypothesis.
current_test: Bonde anticipation WITH KK confirmation minus WITHOUT KK confirmation avg T+5 alpha vs SPY
validation_gate: n>=30 confirmed and n>=30 unconfirmed; confirmed T+5 alpha vs SPY >= +0.50 pp; T+10 or T+20 direction confirms; no one-ticker/week distortion.
falsifier: Confirmed cohort T+5 alpha spread <= 0 or unconfirmed cohort outperforms after sample/maturity gates.
method_note: Compare Bonde anticipation rows WITH vs WITHOUT KK research confirmation on T+5 alpha vs SPY; KK definition excludes only kk_pause_too_long from hard disqualifiers.
oos_semantics: current_n_* is cumulative mature evidence; oos_n_* is strict signal_date >= oos_start_date with mature outcome.
